get.description: Public endpoint: returns whether a session is active (no code revealed).

post.description: Host resumes a past session from a folder. Reuses old session_id from snapshot if available.

get.description: Status endpoint on global router (daemon + backward compat).

post.description: Called by deploy watcher or GitHub Actions when a new push is detected on master.
Host starts a countdown; broadcasts timer to all clients.
Reset all debate state back to scratch.
End arguments phase — store AI request for daemon pickup.
Daemon posts AI cleanup results. Apply and advance to prep.
Daemon notifies server of a time-based event; server pushes to host WS.

get.description: Returns all closed polls as markdown (public endpoint for participants and daemon).
Status endpoint on public router (participant-facing, under session prefix).
